about.imageAlt: Patty, the maker behind Jewels by Patty — photo coming soon
about.label: The maker behind the work
about.title: A craftwoman's heart, a Baltimore spirit
body: Born and raised in the Baltimore area, Patty has spent years perfecting her craft — selecting natural stones by hand, setting each one carefully, and finishing every piece with the kind of attention that only comes from someone who genuinely loves what they do.

What started as a personal passion has grown into something she's proud to share. Every bracelet, necklace, and ring that leaves her hands is a one-of-a-kind creation — made by one person, with care, for you.

featured.label: Handcrafted pieces
featured.title: A glimpse of the work
featured.sub: Each piece is made entirely by hand — no factory lines, no shortcuts. Just Patty, her materials, and years of practiced skill.

craft.label: What makes it special
craft.title: Made by hand. Made with care.

items.title: Natural Stones
items.body: Every piece features genuine, hand-selected gemstones — chosen for their color, character, and quality. No synthetics, no shortcuts.

items.title: Handset by Patty
items.body: Each stone is placed and finished entirely by hand. There is no assembly line — just one person who cares deeply about the result.

items.title: Thoughtful Details
items.body: From the spacers to the clasps, every element is chosen to complement the stones and hold the piece together beautifully for years to come.

cta.label: Custom orders welcome
cta.title: Interested in a piece of your own?
cta.sub: Patty loves working with people on custom orders. Whether you have something specific in mind or just want to start a conversation — reach out. She'd love to hear from you.
